new_claims.claim_text: X demonetized Dom Lucre for 90 days for posting fake, AI-generated war footage.
Elon Musk offered a Cybertruck for proof of who wrote a scripted propaganda video.
new_claims.notes: Effort to identify sources of narrative manipulation.

new_claims.claim_text: Bill Gates will be forced to testify before the House Oversight Committee on June 10, 2026, on whether he raped, trafficked, and tortured children with Jeffrey Epstein on his private island.
new_claims.notes: Serious accusation against a powerful individual, demanding accountability.

new_claims.claim_text: Melania Trump decided to give a televised address about Jeffrey Epstein, calling on Congress to 'act' because Epstein was 'not alone.'
new_claims.notes: Significant development in the Epstein scandal, involving a high-profile political figure.

new_claims.claim_text: 'Epstein was like the hand of the king for the Rothschilds' and that's why he had all his power.
new_claims.notes: Conspiracy theory linking Epstein to the Rothschilds, related to hidden power structures.

new_claims.claim_text: All eligible young men aged 18-25 will be automatically registered for the U.S. military draft starting December 2026.
new_claims.notes: New government policy with significant societal impact.
